final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic illustrating the step-by-step process of deploying Hermes in a Docker container and integrating it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: clean flat vector infographic, technical documentation style, clear visual hierarchy with numbered steps
Subject: four-step deployment workflow showing Docker container setup, Hermes installation, GLMCodingPlan integration, and final configuration
Composition: vertical layout with four numbered sections (1, 2, 3, 4), each containing an icon and concise text block, ample white space between steps
Scene/backdrop: neutral light gray or white background, subtle container/Docker iconography as decorative elements
Color palette: Docker blue (#2496ED) as primary accent, muted grays for secondary elements, white for cards/sections
Text (verbatim): "如何在docker容器里部署hermes，并且接入glmcodingplan"
Constraints: text must be in Chinese; icons must be universally recognizable; each step must be visually distinct
Avoid: cluttered layouts; unreadable small fonts; gradients unless essential; generic stock illustration style
